🏠 Rent Tracker Pro

Automated rent payment tracking and reminder system

💡 How It Works

• We automatically track Interac payments from your email

• Match payments to your tenant list

• Send reminders for unpaid/partial payments

• Update your Google Sheets in real-time

🏢 Property Management Automation
